api_key.description: Freshservice API key, sent as the username of HTTP Basic auth (password is the literal 'X'). Never logged.

domain_name.description: Freshservice account domain (e.g. acme.freshservice.com); combined with the fixed /api/v2 path to form the base URL.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only tickets updated at or after this time are read (tickets stream only).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
